tools.name: jupiter_get_swap_quote
tools.description:
Use this when you need a swap quote on Solana. Returns the best route via Jupiter aggregator across all Solana DEXes with price impact and fee analysis.

1. inputToken: input token symbol and mint address
2. outputToken: output token symbol and mint address
3. inAmount: input amount in raw units
4.

tools.name: jupiter_get_swap_quote
tools.description:
Use this when you need a swap quote on Solana. Returns the best route via Jupiter aggregator across all Solana DEXes with price impact and fee analysis. POST variant of jupiter_get_swap_quote -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. inputToken: input token symbol and mint addr

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: jupiter_get_swap_quote · Private data: jupiter_get_swap_quote, jupiter_get_swap_quote · Public sink: jupiter_get_swap_quote.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: jupiter_get_swap_quote · Private data: jupiter_get_swap_quote, jupiter_get_swap_quote · Public sink: jupiter_get_swap_quote

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "jupiter_get_swap_quote" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "(hash 09f776e8)" → after: "Use this when you need a swap quote on Solana. Returns the best route via Jupiter aggregator across all Solana DEXes with price impact and fee analysis. POST variant of jupiter_get_swap_quote -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. inputToken: input token symbol and mint addr"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
